s: Simple offline music player with minimalistic design
d:
Gramophone is an offline, local music player that can play .mp3, .flac, .ogg, .opus, .m4a, .mka and .wav files.

- Light, stable, and minimalistic
- Up-to-date Material 3 design and theme
- Dynamic player UI Monet color
- Uses MediaStore to quickly access on-device music
- Search and browse for your favourite music
- List and grid views
- Browse songs by folder and filesystem
- Natural sorting and various other sorting options
- Playlist support
- Synced lyrics (LRC, TTML, SRT)
- Supports word/syllable Karaoke lyrics synchronization
- Full support for ReplayGain 2.0
- Support for system/third-party Equalizer apps

If you face any issues, feel free to open an issue at our GitHub page: https://github.com/FoedusProgramme/Gramophone/issues

If you have any security-related or otherwise confidential comments, please email: nift4dev [@] gmail [.] com

Gramophone is open source and released under the GPLv3.0 or later license. We thank all our contributors and translators! https://github.com/FoedusProgramme/Gramophone

You can help translate Gramophone to your language: https://hosted.weblate.org/engage/gramophone/

Note: Gramophone supports the "enhanced album covers" feature. This feature needs the "Photos and videos" permission. This feature is ENTIRELY OPTIONAL and DISABLED BY DEFAULT. We do NOT upload any data anywhere. Your photos are not used, the permission is ONLY used to DISPLAY album covers. That's it.

Note: Not all audio file formats will work on all devices. For more information, please refer to https://developer.android.com/media/media3/exoplayer/supported-formats#progressive-container and https://developer.android.com/media/platform/supported-formats#audio-formats

Note: Gramophone is completely offline, thus it does not support downloading or streaming music. It will only play music files on your device. Gramophone cannot bypass any copy protections.

Note: Our privacy policy is available at https://foedusprogramme.github.io/org/privacy.html
